title: Petersburg Borough Assembly to consider signing letters of support for fisheries across the state
summary: Fishing boats in Petersburg’s North Harbor. (Photo: Shelby Herbert/KFSK) Petersburg’s Borough Assembly is in for a long meeting tonight, with eight new items of business on the agenda. As KFSK’s Shelby Herbert reports, the Assembly will look at signing letters of support for fisheries across the state, in the face of years of hardship. Petersburg’s Borough Assembly will consider sending a letter to the State of Alaska requesting a disaster declaration for fou...

title: Petersburg Volunteer Fire Department fights sauna fire in first call of the year
summary: Petersburg’s Volunteer Fire Department. (Photo by Shelby Herbert/KFSK) Petersburg’s Volunteer Fire Department responded to a sauna fire on the morning of January 11th, about nine miles south of town, inside Service Area 1. The department left town at around 2:40 a.m., and contained the blaze in abou...

title: The US Arctic Gambit: Testing the Limits of UNCLOS
summary: US challenges norms by publishing extended continental shelf limits and fueling calls for Russia's UNCLOS withdrawal. The post The US Arctic Gambit: Testing the Limits of UNCLOS appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Share the Bounty via Pick.Click.Give!
summary: It’s not too late to Pick.Click.Give! Go to pfd.alaska.gov to select KUAC Friends Group and add your pledge.
